---
title: "assignment"
author: "chingiz rabdanov"
date: "2026-04-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
# loading library

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "English")

# dataset loading from github

url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Chingiz1492/NYPD-crime-dataset/main/NYC%20Accidents%202020.csv"

accidents_raw <- read_csv(url)

accidents_processed <- accidents_raw %>%

# Remove records without borough and format text (stringr)
  filter(!is.na(BOROUGH)) %>%
  mutate(BOROUGH = str_to_title(BOROUGH)) %>%
  
# Working with dates and time (lubridate)
  mutate(
    date_parsed  = ymd(`CRASH DATE`),
    month        = month(date_parsed, label = TRUE, abbr = FALSE),
    hour         = hour(`CRASH TIME`)
  ) %>%
  
# Create time of day categories (dplyr)
     mutate(time_of_day = factor(case_when(
    hour >= 5  & hour <= 11 ~ "Morning",
    hour >  11 & hour <= 17 ~ "Afternoon",
    hour >  17 & hour <= 22 ~ "Evening",
    TRUE                    ~ "Night"
    ), levels = c("Night", "Morning", "Afternoon", "Evening"))) %>%

# Convert number of injured persons to numeric format

  mutate(injured_count = as.numeric(`NUMBER OF PERSONS INJURED`))
  
summary_matrix <- accidents_processed %>%
  group_by(BOROUGH, time_of_day) %>%
  summarize(accidents_count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  
#  Pivot table from long to wide format (tidyr)

  pivot_wider(names_from = time_of_day, values_from = accidents_count, values_fill = 0)

# Display formatted table in HTML

knitr::kable(summary_matrix, caption = "Accidents by Borough and Time of Day")

# Use stat_summary to automatically aggregate injured persons
ggplot(accidents_processed, aes(x = month, y = injured_count, fill = BOROUGH)) +
 stat_summary(fun = function(x) sum(x, na.rm = TRUE), geom = "col") +
  facet_wrap(~BOROUGH, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title    = "Distribution of Injured Persons by Borough (2020)",
    subtitle = "Aggregated monthly data",
    x        = "Month",
    y        = "Total Injured",
    fill     = "Borough"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x     = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
